title: Zillow Revenue and Usage Statistics 2026
text: Zillow Premier Agent Revenue and Business Segment Analysis. Premier Agent Revenue Overview: Premier Agent accounts for roughly 50% of Zillow's total revenue, making it a cornerstone of the company's business model. In 2024, Premier Agent and IMT services brought in about $1.6 billion, or just over 70% of the company's total revenue. Historical Revenue Performance: 2022 Premier Agent revenue: $1.09 billion in total revenue. 2022 overall Zillow revenue: $1.839 billion, with $1.291 billion coming from the Premier Agent segment. Recent Performance Metrics: Premier Agent continues to demonstrate resilience, contributing to the company's For Sale revenue growth of 11% year-over-year. Average revenue per agent stabilized at $12,000 annually, up from pandemic lows. Growth Drivers and Outlook: Forecasts project 12-15% CAGR through 2028, driven by international pilots in Canada. The segment's strong profitability is notable: the product's margin profile of approximately 70% gross margin underpins Zillow's path to sustained profitability. Strategic Importance: Premier Agent remains integral to Zillow's integrated platform strategy, connecting sellers with quality agents and driving cross-sell opportunities for mortgages and rentals services.
